constraints.name: adjacency_relation
constraints.description: Two rubber bands intersect if and only if their corresponding vertices are connected by an edge in the tree.

constraints.name: order_constraint
constraints.description: A sequence of rubber bands is nested if each element strictly includes the next, where inclusion requires the inner band to lie completely within the outer band's area without intersection.
constraints.formal: \forall i \in [2, k], includes(a_{i-1}, a_i) \land includes(u, v) \iff v \in \text{area}(u) \land \neg intersect(u, v)

constraints.name: acyclicity
constraints.description: The underlying graph structure is guaranteed to be a tree, implying it is connected and contains no cycles.

objective.description: 最大化满足嵌套条件的序列长度

invariants.name: state_transition
invariants.description: The algorithm maintains two DP states per node representing the maximum nested sequence length for paths within its subtree, distinguished by whether the path endpoint at the node can be extended to its parent. Transitions combine optimal child paths with degree-based node weights, preserving optimal substructure and enabling correct bottom-up aggregation.
